productDisplayName: Nike Men's Classic Leather Black Shoe
description: If you want the ultimate sensation of comfort for your feet, then these Sweet Classic shoes from nike are just made for you. Designed for the tennis-lover, these shoes are a great combination of comfort and style. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Leather uppers for protection, comfort and durability Lace-ups for snug Fit Lightly cushioned collar and tongue for extra comfort Appliquéd swoosh on the sides to create a style statement Embroidered logo on the back of collar and appliqued brand tab on the tongue Midsole Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort EVA midsole for advanced lightweight cushioning Outsole Rubber outsole in herringbone pattern for superior traction and durability Leaf patterened herringbone forefoot for easy movement on the court shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
